---
title: Norwegian Wood
author: Haruki Murakami
date: '2025-10-31'
categories:
- Indonesian fiction
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★★★★★
rating: 5
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# Norwegian Wood
Great book. I think Murakami is able to capture the human condition in a very convincing manner that just draws the reader in. I think there are catcher in the rye vibes from the protagonist and i think the characters are the same people in different contexts. The sex scenes are a little weird though, esp the last one with the motherly figure? That was quite weird. And i liked that it had a semi happy ending? That the protagonist may in the end find joy and light at the end of a very dark tunnel. Overall the storytelling is excellent and i hope the rest of the books from Murakami is as good as this.

## Reading Journey
- 2025-11-04: Started
- 2025-11-04: 1
    - 1 mins
- 2025-11-04: Finished
- Total Time Taken: 1 minutes
## Bookmarks
